notes: Historical local paths were replaced with placeholders such as <management-root> and <repo-root>.
Remaining absolute paths in tests/docs are generic fixtures or /tmp scratch examples, not this machine's paths.
Personal operator names in plan/test/plugin metadata were neutralized where they were not needed as public attribution.
Live/service/LAN/public release actions remain separately gated.
This receipt avoids embedding git status because that would self-reference the dirty state while the receipt is being written; use git status for live state.
